step_rationale: Platelet-derived soluble mediator; thrombus burden and MACE prediction.
mechanism: Soluble semaphorin 4D, a platelet-derived mediator, predicts thrombus burden and major adverse cardiac events.

references.title: The value of serum Sema4D level in predicting the prognosis of patients with acute ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction and with high thrombus burden.
